options.name: --additional-document
options.description:
Location of additional swagger document, used to merge into
the main one. Can be both an http location or a local one and can be used
multiple times

options.name: --clean-directory
options.description: Delete folder before generating

options.name: --client-modifier
options.description:
(Default: -m) The modifier for the generated clients;
Useful when generating with interfaces. Can be Public or Internal

options.name: --directory
options.description:
(Default: Current Directory) The directory to place the
files in

options.name: --filter
options.description:
(Default: No filter) Only generate Clients that match the
supplied regex filter

options.name: --include-options-params
options.description:
Generate key value option params on each method to pass to
each HttpRequestMessage.Options

options.name: --interfaces
options.description: Generate interfaces for the clients

options.name: --json-constructor-attribute
options.description:
Json Constructor Attribute. Constructors are generated when
the class contains required properties

options.name: --json-derived-type-attribute
options.description:
Json Derived Type Attribute. Marks the derived types of the
generated types using the specified attribute. {type} and {value} are used as
template placeholders

options.name: --json-polymorphic-attribute
options.description:
Json Polymorphic Attribute. Marks the generated types as
polymorphic using the specified attribute. {name} is used as a template
placeholder

options.name: --json-property-name-attribute
options.description:
Json Property Name Attribute. Some property names are not
valid in C#. This will make sure serialization works out. {name} is used as a
template placeholder

options.name: --json-source-generators
options.description: Include dotnet 7.0+ Json Source Generators

options.name: --modifier
options.description:
The modifier for the generated files. Can be Public or
Internal

options.name: --namespace
options.description:
(Default: Project name) The namespace used for the
generated files

options.name: --no-obsolete
options.description: Do not generate obsolete endpoints

options.name: --no-project
options.description: Do not generate project

options.name: --oauth-client-credential-style
options.description:
When including an OAuth Client, we can either pass values
in the body or as a basic auth header. Can be PostBody or
AuthorizationHeader

options.name: --oauth-type
options.description:
Includes an OAuth Client. Can be ClientCredentials,
ClientCredentialsWithCertificate, TokenExchange or
CachedTokenExchange

options.name: --required-properties
options.description: Include C# 11 Required keywords

options.name: --stringbuilder-pool-size
options.description:
StringBuilder pool size for building query params. If 0, a
simple string concat is used instead

options.name: --tree-shake
options.description: Skip generating unused models

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Verbose logging

arguments.name: document
arguments.description:
Location of the JSON swagger document. Can be both an http 
location or a local one
